hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); case "$f" in *.py|*.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx) [ -f "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/graphify-out/graph.json" ] && touch "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/graphify-out/.needs_update" ;; esac; exit 0

if [ -f "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/graphify-out/.needs_update" ]; then rm -f "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/graphify-out/.needs_update"; (cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && graphify update . >/dev/null 2>&1) || true; fi; exit 0
